src/main/java/com/poivredesiles/fundrais.general_idea: Move static resource paths from WebSecurityCustomizer ignoring to HttpSecurity permitAll to align with Spring Security 6 best practices.
src/main/java/com/poivredesiles/fundrais.human_impl: Removed WebSecurityCustomizer bean and added static paths to the PUBLIC array used in permitAll.

src/main/java/com/poivredesiles/fundrais.general_idea: Expose the current servlet path to the view model for navigation or UI logic.
Expose a boolean flag indicating if the user can contact support or admins, based on specific roles.
Correct the JPA relationship annotation from OneToOne to ManyToOne to accurately reflect the database schema and entity association.
Inject EntityManager to allow manual persistence context management for performance optimization.
Mark the read-only search method with @Transactional to ensure proper transaction handling for the new batching logic.
Uncomment and activate the previously disabled code path for searching encrypted text fields by retrieving orders in batches.
src/main/java/com/poivredesiles/fundrais.human_impl: Removed comment blocks around getIdsOfMatchingStringFields call and implementation.

src/main/java/com/poivredesiles/fundrais.general_idea: Clear the persistence context between batches to prevent memory issues and improve performance when processing large datasets.
Update the loop variable and termination condition to use page-based iteration instead of element count for cleaner batching.
Reduce the batch size from 100 to 50 to balance memory usage and network overhead during the search operation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 3.0.13 to 3.4.5 to align with the Java 21 migration target.
Update the managed Java version property from 17 to 21.
Upgrade Lombok to 1.18.34 to ensure compatibility with newer JDKs and Spring Boot 3.4.
Remove explicit version from Lombok dependency to rely on Spring Boot's managed BOM version.
Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve annotation processing conflicts between Lombok and MapStruct.
Register lombok-mapstruct-binding in the annotation processor paths for the compiler plugin.
Replace deprecated source/target compiler arguments with the modern 'release' flag for Java 9+ compatibility.
Replace deprecated webjars-locator-core with webjars-locator-lite as required by Spring Boot 3.4.
Remove the OpenRewrite Maven plugin used for the initial migration, as it is no longer needed.
Normalize indentation in pom.xml to use tabs instead of mixed spaces/tabs.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Docker base image from Eclipse Temurin 11 to Eclipse Temurin 17 to align with the Java 17 runtime requirement.

src/main/resources/application-dev.prope.general_idea: Comment out the explicit MariaDB 10.3 dialect configuration to allow Hibernate to auto-detect the dialect, as the specific class was removed or deprecated in newer Hibernate versions compatible with Java 21.

src/main/resources/application-prod.prop.general_idea: Comment out the explicit MariaDB 10.3 dialect property to allow Hibernate to auto-detect the dialect, as older specific dialects are deprecated or removed in newer Hibernate versions compatible with Java 21.

src/main/resources/application-test.prop.general_idea: Remove the explicit JPA database platform property because Hibernate 6 (used in Spring Boot 3) auto-detects the dialect, making the manual configuration redundant.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Remove the explicit MySQL8Dialect configuration as it is no longer required or recommended in newer Hibernate versions used by Spring Boot 3.x.
Disable the Open Session In View pattern to prevent lazy loading issues and performance warnings in Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/resources/templates/fragments/a.general_idea: Update Thymeleaf fragment replacement syntax to use the explicit tilde selector to resolve deprecation warnings or errors in newer Spring Boot/Thymeleaf versions.
Extract hardcoded API endpoint URLs into constants to improve maintainability and allow Thymeleaf context resolution.
Replace string concatenation with template literals for constructing AJAX request URLs.
